since_last: 72% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.11% · BTC -4.64% · Gold -2.64% · Nasdaq100 +2.46%. 72% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.72%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.72%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +13.74%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +13.74%, SMR +11.07%, SMCI +10.84%, INTC +10.57%, CRNC +9.00%. Laggards: INOD -6.70%, SPCX -6.42%, IBM -4.07%, WDAY -2.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.42% at $179.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
